title: Require Agent Router Shape
forbids: an AGENTS.md router without the Scope, Boundaries, Flow, Routing, and Validation anchors or without a repository-relative Markdown edge to another AGENTS.md
why: A stable local plaque must identify its jurisdiction, name its boundary and flow, join the operator-router graph, route deeper concepts to repository-owned authority, and tell an operator how to prove local work.
remediate: Add the missing structural anchor and at least one repository-relative Markdown link to the applicable parent or child AGENTS.md. Keep deep explanation and temporal state in the linked owner rather than expanding the router.
message: Agent routers require local orientation anchors, flow, and a repository-relative edge in the AGENTS.md graph.
